headline: Assessing CoStar Group (CSGP) Valuation After Recent 3 Month Share Price Weakness
summary: CoStar Group stock: recent performance snapshot CoStar Group (CSGP) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch, with the stock up around 4% over the past month but down about 21% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for CoStar Group. That recent 4% 1 month share price return contrasts with a much weaker trend, with the stock down sharply on a 3 month basis and longer term total shareholder returns also significantly negative. This suggests momentum has been fading rather...
